description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-list. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-list-item** (`hx-list/hx-list-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-list AND hx-list-item. Verify ARIA roles (list/listitem pattern), keyboard navigation, screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-list-item API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-05: Use `div[role="list"]` instead of `<ul>/<ol>` with slotted web components
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/` (includes hx-list-item.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-list.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-list

descriptionHistory.description: Launch readiness audit for hx-list. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, WCAG 2.1 AA. C-PATTERN-05: use div[role=list] not ul/ol with slotted WC children. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-list.md`

Launch readiness audit for hx-list. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-list-item** (`hx-list/hx-list-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-list AND hx-list-item. Verify ARIA roles (list/listitem pattern), keyboard navigation, screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-list-item API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-05: Use `div[role="list"]` instead of `<ul>/<ol>` with slotted web components
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/` (includes hx-list-item.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-list.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 2**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-list.mdx`:
- Around line 310-341: The "Standalone HTML Example" for hx-list claims "no
build tool required" but omits how to load the private `@helix/library`, so either
remove this standalone section or change it to a clarified bundled example:
update the heading/description to state the bundle must be pre-built and loaded,
and add a sample <script type="module"
src="/path/to/your/helix-bundle.js"></script> note showing how to load the
bundled library before using hx-list and hx-list-item (or explicitly state the
example assumes the library is already globally available). Ensure the mdx text
around "Standalone HTML Example" and the comments referencing `@helix/library` are
updated to reflect this change.
- Around line 110-121: The interactive demo is missing the required label for
the hx-list element; update the <hx-list variant="interactive"> instance used in
the "Rich Items" ComponentDemo by adding an accessible label attribute (for
example label="Select an item" or a context-appropriate phrase) to satisfy WCAG
Name, Role, Value requirements; ensure the label text clearly describes the
list's purpose and keep it present on the hx-list element (the one containing
hx-list-item children) so the interactive variant has a proper accessible name.
```

</details>
